description_long: This is a sleek, modern knife with a single-edged, slightly curved blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade and handle are finished in a striking iridescent blue and purple metallic sheen, giving it a futuristic appearance. The handle is integrated with the blade, featuring a smooth, ergonomic contour and a circular hole at the end, possibly for hanging or attaching a lanyard. There are no visible grip textures or additional materials on the handle, suggesting a minimalist, monolithic construction. The blade is relatively thin, with a flat profile when viewed from the side and a narrow edge when viewed head-on. No decorative engravings or embellishments are present, emphasizing a clean, utilitarian design.
description: A sleek, iridescent blue and purple knife with a curved, single-edged blade and a smooth, contoured handle featuring a circular hole at the end.
description_view_0: The knife is seen edge-on, appearing as a thin vertical line with minimal visible detail.
description_view_1: The full side profile reveals the curved blade, contoured handle, and iridescent blue-purple finish.
description_view_2: Another edge-on view, showing the knife as a thin line, similar to view 0.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile, mirroring view 1, with the same blade and handle features visible.
attribute_handle_design: smooth, contoured, integrated with blade, circular hole at end, metallic
